title: oldenlandia matthewii
intro: Oldenlandia matthewii, also known as Matthew's oldenlandia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving antioxidant activity, and supporting immune function. Oldenlandia matthewii can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in Asia, particularly in China and India.
